ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flocks" (
  "flock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flock */,
  "flock_name" TEXT /* Name of the flock */,
  "breed" TEXT /* Breed of the hens in the flock */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the flock was introduced to the farm */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the flock is expected to be removed from the farm */,
  "initial_population" INTEGER /* Initial population of the flock */,
  "current_population" INTEGER /* Current population of the flock */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the flock (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "flock_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flock group (optional) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the flock (e.g., barn, farm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flock_group" (
  "flock_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flock group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the flock group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the flock group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flock_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flock_group_member" (
  "flock_group_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flock group member */,
  "flock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flock */,
  "flock_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flock group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flock_group_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flock_group_member_flock_id FOREIGN KEY ("flock_id") REFERENCES flocks ("flock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flock_group_member_flock_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("flock_group_id") REFERENCES flock_group ("flock_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feed_supplier" (
  "feed_supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feed supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the feed supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "pricing" REAL /* Pricing of the feed (per kg) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feed_consumption" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feed consumption record */,
  "flock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the consumption data */,
  "total_feed_consumed" REAL /* Total amount of feed consumed (g) */,
  "feed_type" TEXT /* Type of feed (e.g., starter, grower, layer) */,
  "feed_cost" REAL /* Cost of the feed consumed */,
  "feed_supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feed supplier */,
  "feed_batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the feed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feed_consumption_feed_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("feed_supplier_id") REFERENCES feed_supplier ("feed_supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "egg_production" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each egg production record */,
  "flock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the production data */,
  "total_eggs_produced" INTEGER /* Total number of eggs produced */,
  "total_eggs_sold" INTEGER /* Total number of eggs sold */,
  "total_eggs_discarded" INTEGER /* Total number of eggs discarded */,
  "average_egg_weight" REAL /* Average weight of the eggs produced (g) */,
  "egg_color" TEXT /* Color of the eggs produced (e.g., brown, white) */,
  "egg_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the eggs produced (e.g., grade A, grade B) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health record */,
  "flock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the health record */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status of the flock */,
  "disease_incidence" TEXT /* Incidence of any diseases */,
  "treatment_administered" TEXT /* Treatment administered if any */,
  "mortality_rate" REAL /* Mortality rate of the flock (%) */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease (if any) */,
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medication administered (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_records_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES disease_records ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_records_medication_id FOREIGN KEY ("medication_id") REFERENCES medication ("medication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medication" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage instructions for the medication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medication_administration" (
  "administration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication administration record */,
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medication */,
  "flock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of administration */,
  "dosage_administered" TEXT /* Dosage administered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("administration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medication_administration_medication_id FOREIGN KEY ("medication_id") REFERENCES medication ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medication_administration_flock_id FOREIGN KEY ("flock_id") REFERENCES flocks ("flock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental condition record */,
  "flock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the environmental condition data */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature (°C or °F) */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity (%) */,
  "lighting" TEXT /* Lighting conditions (e.g., natural, artificial) */,
  "air_quality" TEXT /* Air quality (e.g., good, moderate, poor) */,
  "temperature_unit" TEXT /* Unit of temperature (°C or °F) */,
  "humidity_unit" TEXT /* Unit of humidity (%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flock_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event record */,
  "flock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flock_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "flock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the financial record */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated from egg sales */,
  "costs" REAL /* Total costs incurred (e.g., feed, labor, maintenance) */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit calculated as revenue minus costs */,
  "revenue_type" TEXT /* Type of revenue (e.g., egg sales, feed sales) */,
  "cost_type" TEXT /* Type of cost (e.g., feed, labor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, veterinarian, data analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "flock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., view-only, edit) */,
  "access_expiry" TEXT /* Date when the access expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "breeds" (
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each breed */,
  "breed_name" TEXT /* Name of the breed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the breed */,
  "expected_body_weight" REAL /* Expected body weight of the hens (g) */,
  "expected_egg_production" REAL /* Expected egg production rate (%) */,
  "expected_feed_efficiency" REAL /* Expected feed efficiency (g feed per g egg) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("breed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feed_types" (
  "feed_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feed type */,
  "feed_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the feed type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feed type */,
  "cost_per_kg" REAL /* Cost of the feed type per kilogram */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disease_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease record */,
  "flock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the disease record */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease */,
  "affected_hens" INTEGER /* Number of hens affected */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment administered */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the treatment (e.g., recovered, ongoing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "flock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the vaccination */,
  "vaccine_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccine */,
  "dose" TEXT /* Dose of the vaccine administered */,
  "administered_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who administered the vaccine */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
)
